arts.ttl: Stoke predicted starting XI vs Swansea as Mark Robins weighs up midfield dilemma
arts.sum: Lewis Baker, Seko, Andrew Moran, fit-again Jordan Thompson and Ben Pearson and Bosun Lawal - who are both returning from long-term injuries - are the manager's options. Stoke predicted starting XI vs Swansea: Johansson, Tchamadeu, Wilson-Esbrand, Phillips, Rose, Burger, Baker, Koumas, Junho, Al-Hamadi, Lowe.

arts.ttl: Mark Robins lays out Stoke City recruitment plan after key exit
arts.sum: But the club is also working behind the scenes to make sure that things are in place to move in the right direction in the long-term – and Lee Darnbrough has left a key vacancy after leaving his role in charge of the transfers department, one week after the end of a frustrating January window. That is what Stoke will have to try to emulate – even if Robins is clear this is “a totally different challenge” – and making sure that the next big appointment is right will be vital.

arts.ttl: Stoke City boss determined to take 'big chance' starting with Swansea City
arts.sum: Robins has only had two home league games since taking over on New Year’s Day – goalless draws with Plymouth and Oxford – and he wants to take the chance to get shots in the net, points on the board and build the relationship with Stoke supporters that he knows will be central to anything and everything that happens next. “I’ve just looked at the fixture board in my office and three out of the next four are at home, we’ve got Norwich away next week obviously, but it’s a big chance to pick up some points on the back of good and better performances.

arts.ttl: Mark Robins has his say on Stoke City goal scoring and lessons learned
arts.sum: Robins is preparing for a home game against Swansea on Saturday (3pm) hoping for his first league goal at the bet365 Stadium, having scored three there in the FA Cup last weekend against Cardiff. Mark Robins has spelled out the importance of creating more opportunities to score goals as the priority for Stoke City.

arts.ttl: ‘Massive’ – Stoke City prediction made by EFL pundit ahead of Swansea City match
arts.sum: Stoke City have been backed for a narrow home win against Swansea City this weekend by EFL pundit… The post ‘Massive’ – Stoke City prediction made by EFL pundit ahead of Swansea City match appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Stoke City and Championship rivals brace for FFP update after Premier League vote
arts.sum: The Premier League's contentious spending regulations, known as the Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR) or Financial Fair Play (FFP), are set to continue in their current guise for at least one more season. The decision was essentially finalised during a Premier League shareholders' meeting in London, even though clubs such as Manchester United, along with Aston Villa and Newcastle United, have publicly criticised the rules.
